title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies:
Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies!
